programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Redcoat-turned-barber Danny hosts a Bulgarian evening in homage to his wife and gets emotional in front of his guests.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Glam goth and wannabe vampire Maria plans an East-meets-West menu and devilish dancing. But Tracksuit Dom serves the biggest surprise when he turns up in a suit and tie.

programme.title: Paul Merton: Driving Amazing Trains
programme.desc: On the French Riviera, Paul takes control of a steam engine on the stunning Pine Cone line and rides in the cab of millionaire businessman Paul Ricard's private line.

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up To Cancer
programme.desc: Roman Kemp, Amelia Dimoldenberg, Sarah Beeny and Maxine Peake take cupcakes to a new level, and create memorable romantic dates in biscuit form.

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: A 90-year-old sings the Sinatra classic that got him his voice back after he had a stroke. A 15-year-old sings about growing up Black in Britain. And a father and son sing a lullaby.

programme.title: Virgin Island
programme.desc: A new group arrive on Virgin Island. To confront the issues that are preventing them from achieving intimacy, the brave young virgins unpack their deepest fears and anxieties.

programme.title: Virgin Island
programme.desc: The group explore turn-ons and surrogate partner therapy. Alex gets to grips with his erection issues. And Marianne works on her trust issues.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Alex Horne treats the contestants to a song, but not everyone appreciates it. A grunting Kumail Nanjiani embraces Amy Gledhill and Joel Dommett while they quiz him about a horse.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: First Dates, Squid Game, Olivia Attwood: The Price of Perfection, Match Me Abroad, Building the Band and BBC News (bingo and Oasis).

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics cast their eyes over Your Song, University Challenge, I'm a Celebrity... South Africa, MasterChef, Emmerdale, The Assembly, Made in Chelsea, and more.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Former nanny Amber wants to have beautiful babies on a farm, but does her dashing date have the film star looks she's after? A magician and a pole dancer are looking for love too.

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up To Cancer
programme.desc: Roman Kemp, Amelia Dimoldenberg, Sarah Beeny and Maxine Peake take cupcakes to a new level, and create memorable romantic dates in biscuit form.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programme.desc: George takes on a 16th-century, Grade II listed Cotswolds cottage with some nasty surprises. And a Kent oast house needs a super-cool bedroom for an eight-year-old.

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum & Dad
programme.desc: The Bakers help out at the 191st Durham Regatta, discover the secrets of Durham Castle and explore the exotic wonders of Durham University Botanic Garden.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: In France, craft brewery owners Simon and Rebecca sink their savings into a new taproom. Can Natasha and Giles keep their Spanish restaurant-bar afloat.

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Almería, the Garners deliver a 'wow-some' villa for Mark and Julie. In Alicante, the Rodriguezes give brothers-in-law Graham and Norman some food for thought.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Neil and Linda from Lanarkshire want a rustic holiday home near Antequera in southern Spain to enjoy with all the family. Danni Menzies shows them five options for their £140,000 budget.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Rachel and Robin dream of buying a holiday home - which could later become their permanent home - in Alicante's Jalón Valley. Can Ben Hillman find their perfect place for £250k.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Louisa and Roger rush to finish a suite for their first wedding. Debbie and Dave transform their disused barn into a craft retreat. Alison and Zion tackle mismatched windows.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil look back at Nikki and Andy's cluttered terrace in Northampton. Did Kirstie's plan banish the couple's working-from-home woes.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Welfare team leader Jennie honours her city's fishing heritage with her under-the-sea theme, on a lively night of twerking and seal impressions.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Wrestling promoter James puts on a show with spicy Mexican food and a full-blown wrestling match with wrestling outfits for his guests.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Vegetarian Katrena plans a glamorous cruise ship theme. Will her unusual strawberry soup starter and towel-folding entertainment sink or swim.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Super-confident mum-of-three Natalie's night is full of faux pas, about everything from Botox to cougars.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Retirement community manager George has talked the talk all week, and now expectations are high for his egg drop soup and flambéed crêpes Suzette.

programme.title: Greggs vs McDonald's: The Fast Feud
programme.desc: How did Greggs steal McDonald's fast food crown and how is McDonald's fighting back? Dani Dyer explores this extraordinary fast food feud.

programme.title: Help! I Bought It at Auction with Sarah Beeny
programme.desc: Christy and Matt pour £1m into a seven-bed house in serious need of TLC. Heather and Dave take on converted stables that they bought when they were on holiday.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: First Dates, Squid Game, Olivia Attwood: The Price of Perfection, Match Me Abroad, Building the Band and BBC News (bingo and Oasis).

programme.title: World's Tallest Man: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Fifteen years after becoming the world's tallest man, Sultan Kösen returns to London to be measured by Guinness World Records, confront his health issues and talk romance.

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up To Cancer
programme.desc: Roman Kemp, Amelia Dimoldenberg, Sarah Beeny and Maxine Peake take cupcakes to a new level, and create memorable romantic dates in biscuit form.

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: A 90-year-old sings the Sinatra classic that got him his voice back after he had a stroke. A 15-year-old sings about growing up Black in Britain. And a father and son sing a lullaby.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics cast their eyes over Your Song, University Challenge, I'm a Celebrity... South Africa, MasterChef, Emmerdale, The Assembly, Made in Chelsea, and more.

programme.title: Rescue: Extreme Medics
programme.desc: The air ambulance attends a high-speed collision and a minibus crash by Loch Lomond. And a man has a severe injury from a circular saw after trying to chop wood.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Air ambulance medics race to help a teen with major brain injury after a car collision. And 10-year-old Jack is confused and nauseous from a bang on the head.

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours in Vilnius
programme.desc: Sarah Millican joins Joe Lycett in the Lithuanian capital Vilnius, where hot air ballooning, cepelinai dumplings and gira, and the Lukiskes Prison await.

programme.title: Jamie's One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver makes a sublime dukkah roast lamb feast with a fantastic hack to speed up cooking.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programme.desc: George helps with the restoration of an Edwardian Arts and Crafts terraced house in south London, and visits the wallpaper library of his all-time design hero, William Morris.

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum & Dad
programme.desc: In Northumberland, the Bakers explore Lord William Armstrong's pioneering hydro-electric inventions at Cragside House and Gardens and Cragend Farm.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: In Andalucía, Michael and Shaun host their first wedding. Jane and Walter face difficult decisions over their Italian B&B's future.

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: The Garners tug on Alan and Tina's heartstrings, but can they loosen their purse strings? The Aldertons get motorcycle-mad Keith and Margaret revved up with characterful villas.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Joy and John from Chesterfield are searching for their dream holiday home near the town of Fuengirola on Spain's Costa del Sol. Can Ben Hillman find their perfect property for £125,000.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Teacher Wendy's looking for her dream Italian holiday home in Puglia. Jean Johannson lines up five great properties for her £200k. Will any of them get top marks.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Ben and Billie battle brambles to create a riverside retreat. Louisa and Roger's new suite has last-minute changes. Mark and Sandra scramble to prepare their gîte for guests.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil look back at Kathleen and Tom's three-bed Victorian semi in Newcastle, where chaos reigned and discipline was desperately needed.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Former property developer Ian hopes to make his guests feel at home in his country mansion on a night of so-called 'healthy' grub, saucy attire and naked surprises.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Sophie, the reigning Miss Cheltenham, hosts a high-energy evening of elegant food and perfect pageantry, featuring glitz, glam and surprising revelations.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Carmel plans a fun-filled rugby theme featuring a Six Nations starter and Key lime pie dessert, and a haka in the back garden.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Teacher Polly takes a risk with a seafood starter and meaty main that she's never cooked before. And some of her guests' table manners leave a lot to be desired..

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hair salon manager Chris hosts a high-octane final night, and the guests reveal what they really think of each other.

programme.title: Secret Africa: Into the Wild
programme.desc: Halfway through their trek, explorer Lucy Shepherd and the team of nomadic hunter-gatherers face dense forests and the threat of elephants, as rations run dangerously low.
